hero.subtitle: A STREET FOR ALL TASTES. A PROMENADE FOR ALL SENSES.

discover.title: Explore the Stråk
discover.subtitle: YOUR GUIDE TO SHOPPING AND CAFES IN SOFO. A VIBRANT NEIGHBORHOOD AROUND NYTORGSGATAN, SÖDERMALM.

about.label: About the area
about.p1: Nytorgsstråket is the heart of Nytorgsgatan in SoFo, Södermalm. Here you'll find a carefully curated selection of Stockholm's best local shopping, specialty cafes, and award-winning restaurants.
about.p2: Experience authentic SoFo Stockholm — an area where international brands meet local artisans, all gathered on a pedestrian-friendly street known for its unique culture and vibrant atmosphere.

newsletter.label: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Get the latest news regarding opening hours, events, and updates from Nytorgsstråket directly in your inbox.
newsletter.success: Thank you! You are now subscribed to the newsletter.
newsletter.privacy: No spam — unsubscribe at any time.

footer.description: Your guide to the best shopping, food, and cafes along Nytorgsgatan and SoFo in Södermalm, Stockholm.
